log.context:
Done. The fix in `/mnt/data/start-claude-bot.sh` changes the `--dangerously-load-development-channels` value from bare `"discord"` to the tagged format `"plugin:discord@claude-channel-discord"`, where:
- `discord` is the channel name (as declared in the plugin's MCP source attribute)
- `claude-channel-discord` is the plugin package name (from `/mnt/data/discord-plugin/package.json`)
